_comment: TESTIMONIAL BANNER CONFIG: Add, remove, reorder, or replace testimonial banners in this file. For each testimonial, update bannerImage and bannerAlt. Recommended banner size is 1200x675, 16:9 aspect ratio. Upload future images to assets/images/testimonials/.

testimonial: EduPath India helped me compare branches and prepare a cleaner admission checklist. I could discuss options with my family with more confidence.
bannerAlt: Student testimonial banner for Aarav Mishra, B.Tech Computer Science

testimonial: The counselling conversation helped me understand MBA specialisations and the questions I should ask colleges before applying.
bannerAlt: Student testimonial banner for Priya Nair, MBA

testimonial: I was unsure about BCA and engineering alternatives. EduPath India explained the differences in a practical, student-friendly way.
bannerAlt: Student testimonial banner for Rohan Das, BCA

testimonial: The guidance was clear and did not pressure me. I got a better sense of course fit and application steps.
bannerAlt: Student testimonial banner for Sanya Patra, B.Tech Data Science

testimonial: EduPath India helped me prepare questions for MBA colleges and compare options beyond only brand names.
bannerAlt: Student testimonial banner for Aditya Sen, MBA Business Analytics

testimonial: The team helped me organise admission documents and understand why verifying college details directly matters.
bannerAlt: Student testimonial banner for Meera Sahu, B.Tech Civil Engineering
